channel.title: Two Dad Jokes Daily
channel.description: Two fresh dad jokes every day, delivered by an animated dad. For TikTok and Instagram Reels.

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #28: Where’s the bin
item.description:
Where’s the bin?
Dad: I haven’t been anywhere!
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260428-2308.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #27: A quick shoutout to...
item.description:
A quick shoutout to all of the sidewalks out there...
Thanks for keeping me off the streets.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260428-1610.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #26: Do you know where...
item.description:
Do you know where you can get chicken broth in bulk?
The stock market.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260427-2307.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #25: My Computer Froze!
item.description:
It was so cold yesterday my computer froze.
My own fault though, I left too many windows open.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260427-1553.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Sunday Funday #24: 80's Band Problems!
item.description:
I was in an 80's band called the prevention.
We were better than the cure.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260426-2256.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Sunday Funday #23: Break a Leg? But Why?!
item.description:
Why do we tell actors to “break a leg?
” Because every play has a cast.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260426-1454.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Weekend Wild Card #22: Magical Cows?!
item.description:
What kind of magic do cows believe in?
MOODOO.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260425-2254.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Weekend Wild Card #21: Ghostly Garments?
item.description:
What kind of pants do ghosts wear?
Boo jeans.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260425-1452.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Joke Court Friday #20: Disease Named After YOU?!
item.description:
Doctor: Do you want to hear the good news or the bad news?
Patient: Good news please. Doctor: we're naming a disease after you.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260424-2256.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Joke Court Friday #19: I've got a joke...
item.description:
I've got a joke about vegetables for you...
but it's a bit corny.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260424-1515.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Throwback Thursday #18: Money Problems?
item.description:
Why did the man put his money in the freezer?
He wanted cold hard cash!
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260423-2302.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Throwback Thursday #17: Where do fish keep...
item.description:
Where do fish keep their money?
In the riverbank
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260423-1600.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #16: What did he do next?!
item.description:
My boss told me to have a good day.
So I went home...
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260422-2302.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #14: Han Solo's Favorite Thing?
item.description:
Why does Han Solo like gum?
It's chewy!
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260422-1336.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #13: A man was caught...
item.description:
A man was caught stealing in a supermarket today while balanced on the shoulders of a couple of vampires.
He was charged with shoplifting on two counts.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260422-1326.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #12: Butter Rumors?!
item.description:
Have you heard the rumor going around about butter?
Never mind, I shouldn't spread it.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260421-2256.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #11: As I suspected, someone...
item.description:
As I suspected, someone has been adding soil to my garden.
The plot thickens.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260421-1520.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #10: What is Cloning?
item.description:
Guy told me today he did not know what cloning is.
I told him, "that makes 2 of us."
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260420-2300.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #9: What don't watermelons get...
item.description:
What don't watermelons get married?
Because they cantaloupe.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260420-1614.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #8: My friend keeps telling...
item.description:
My friend keeps telling me "Cheer up.
You aren't stuck in a deep hole in the ground, filled with water." I know he means well.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260420-1502.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny
